name: Ghost, König and Keegan
description: ｡ﾟ. ୨ | Kinktober (Day 31) | Gangbang | After getting lost from some friends in a house of horror with several attractions designed to make your blood boil in terror, you come across not one, but *three* of them, trapped in one of the many rooms. | Art credits: 661ave on twitter.
